AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Building a Human Handoff Interface for AI-Powered Insurance Agent Using Parlant and Streamlit
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This article details the process of building a human handoff interface for an AI-powered insurance agent, leveraging Parlant and Streamlit for enhanced interaction. It focuses on the practical implementation of AI agents in a specific industry with human oversight.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: OpenAI Debuts Agent Builder and AgentKit: A Visual-First Stack for Building, Deploying, and Evaluating AI Agents
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: OpenAI has launched Agent Builder and AgentKit, a visual-first stack designed to simplify the creation, deployment, and evaluation of AI agents. This new toolkit aims to make building sophisticated AI agents more accessible.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: A New Agency-Focused Supervision Approach Scales Software AI Agents With Only 78 Examples
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: Researchers have developed a novel agency-focused supervision approach that enables the scaling of software AI agents using a remarkably small dataset of only 78 examples. This method significantly improves the efficiency of training and deploying AI agents.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Accelerating Qwen3-8B Agent on Intel® Core™ Ultra with Depth-Pruned Draft Models
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This article explores methods to accelerate the Qwen3-8B Agent on Intel® Core™ Ultra processors, utilizing depth-pruned draft models for improved performance. It focuses on optimizing the execution of AI agents on specific hardware.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Google’s new AI agent rewrites code to automate vulnerability fixes
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: Google has developed a new AI agent capable of rewriting code to autonomously identify and fix software vulnerabilities. This development marks a significant step towards automated cybersecurity.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Koinify: The Future of Crypto Crowd Funding

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Nasdaq, Citi Join Novogratz in Funding Blockchain Firm Symbiont
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Nasdaq and Citi have participated in a funding round for blockchain firm Symbiont, alongside Mike Novogratz. This investment signals growing institutional interest and support for enterprise blockchain solutions.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Homeland Security Funding Blockchain Technology via SBIRs
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: The Department of Homeland Security is allocating funding to blockchain technology projects through its Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) programs. This initiative underscores government investment in developing secure and innovative blockchain applications.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Funding Blockchain Ecosystems

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Indian Banks to Start Blockchain-Based Funding for SMEs to Avoid Defaulters
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Indian banks are reportedly planning to introduce blockchain-based funding platforms designed for Small and Medium Enterprises (SMEs) to mitigate default risks. This initiative aims to streamline lending processes and enhance financial transparency.
